media.title: Lakers Rumors: Undrafted Free Agent Peter Suder Agrees To Two-Way Contract
media.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have reportedly agreed to a two-way contract with Peter Suder, an undrafted free agent out of Miami (OH).

items.title: Sources: The Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a two-way contract with MAC Player of the Year Peter Suder. He led Miami (OH) to a 31-0 regular-season record and shot 42% from 3-point range this season. Keith Kreiter and Sam Cipriano of Edge Sports completed the deal.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Los Angeles Lakers have agreed to a two-way contract with MAC Player of the Year Peter Suder. He led Miami (OH) to a 31-0 regular-season record and shot 42% from 3-point range this season. Keith Kreiter and Sam Cipriano of Edge Sports completed the deal.

items.title: Draft News: A league source tells me UConn's Tarris Reed was in for a predraft workout with the Celtics this past weekend in a group that also included Arizona's Jaden Bradley, Illinois' Ben Humrichous, Miami (OH)'s Peter Suder, and UNC's Seth Trimble.
items.author: John Karalis
items.body_excerpt: Draft News: A league source tells me UConn's Tarris Reed was in for a predraft workout with the Celtics this past weekend in a group that also included Arizona's Jaden Bradley, Illinois' Ben Humrichous, Miami (OH)'s Peter Suder, and UNC's Seth Trimble.
